model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase MLP capacity with one additional hidden block to improve representational power under the fixed 256-step budget while keeping the change minimal and low risk.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Test decoupled weight decay with AdamW to improve optimization/generalization balance for the deeper MLP under a short fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Increase examples processed per optimization step under fixed-step evaluation, which often improves validation loss in short-budget MLP training without adding model complexity.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Push larger-batch training further in fixed-step mode so each of the 256 optimization steps uses more examples, which can improve short-horizon validation loss for this MLP.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue scaling batch size in fixed-step training to maximize unique examples consumed per run; this has produced the strongest gains so far on this workload.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Test whether the same strong trend continues by further increasing per-step sample throughput in fixed-step mode, potentially improving loss with minimal code complexity.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With much larger batch size, raise learning rate to better match gradient scale and accelerate optimization across the same fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue the strongest empirical direction by increasing batch size again, allowing each fixed-step run to process substantially more training examples.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"After scaling batch size to 2048, increase learning rate further to maintain effective update magnitude and improve convergence within the same fixed step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Reduce regularization pressure now that optimization is stronger (large batch and higher LR), which may improve fit and lower validation loss within the fixed training horizon.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"warmup_steps = min(max(int(0.1 * total_steps), 1), total_steps)","new":"warmup_steps = min(max(int(0.05 * total_steps), 1), total_steps)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Shorten warmup for fixed-step training so more of the 256-step budget runs at higher effective learning rate, which can improve final loss at this large-batch regime.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"warmup_steps = min(max(int(0.05 * total_steps), 1), total_steps)","new":"warmup_steps = min(max(int(0.1 * total_steps), 1), total_steps)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Undo the harmful warmup reduction and restore the previously better-performing schedule setting.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"With very large batch training, lowering AdamW beta2 can improve adaptation speed and reduce optimizer lag, potentially improving fixed-step validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Test a slightly lower beta2 to further increase optimizer responsiveness in the large-batch, short-horizon regime.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.92)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Probe a slightly more aggressive beta2 reduction to further improve adaptation speed in the fixed-step large-batch regime.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.92)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Revert the last harmful beta2 change and return to the better-performing optimizer setting.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly reduce learning rate to improve late-stage stability with large-batch AdamW while keeping the strong optimizer and batch settings.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Undo the detrimental learning-rate decrease and restore the better-performing value.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Try a modest increase in decoupled weight decay to slightly improve generalization while preserving the currently strong large-batch optimizer settings.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}
